steps.t: Torsbury lies to the west of Oserley, near the border of the Stonedeans. Ordlac bade you hurry by the straightest route to Torsbury to aid Tordag and …
Tordag is at his encampment just north of the road between Torsbury and Stoke. Fríthild sent you to bring the signet of Torsbury to Tordag, summoning …
